w:r.w:t: Light Of Day Coaching – Judy Johnson – Coaching + Coach Training

w:r.w:t: First impression — convey warmth, credibility, and clarity about who you help and how.
Three service pillars (Young Adults, Executives, Change Coaching)
Book a Discovery Call / Let’s Connect
Empowering People to Grow Through Change
Whether you’re just starting your career, leading transformation, or navigating what’s next, I help you find clarity, confidence, and purpose through coaching.
My passion lies in helping people move through those moments with confidence and purpose. As a
, I combine deep corporate insight with an empathetic, human-centered approach.

I’ve worked across global and matrix organizations, guiding executives, teams, and emerging talent through transformation. My approach is rooted in curiosity, connection, and the belief that lasting change starts with self-awareness.
Coach | HR and Change Leader | Partner in Growth and Transformation
I’m a certified coach and organizational effectiveness leader with over 20 years of experience helping people and organizations navigate growth and change.
My career began in Human Resources and evolved through leadership roles in
organizational effectiveness, change management, and talent strategy
across global and matrix organizations. Along the way, I discovered my greatest passion: empowering people to move through uncertainty with confidence, clarity, and purpose.

Whether I’m coaching a young adult exploring their career direction, guiding an executive through transformation, or supporting teams adapting to change, my approach is grounded in empathy, curiosity, and actionable insight.
I believe growth happens when we create space to reflect, build awareness, and take intentional steps forward — even when the path feels unclear.
+ years in Human Resources, Organizational Effectiveness & Change Leadership
Human resources and Change management certifications: CHRL, Prosci
Global experience leading transformations and talent programs
Skilled facilitator, mentor, and leadership development partner
I bring together the best of both
the strategic lens of a change leader
the human-centered presence of a coach
to help individuals, teams, and organizations grow through change.
Change is constant. Growth is a choice. My work helps people make that choice with purpose and confidence.
Coaching isn’t about fixing people — it’s about creating space for discovery, growth, and confidence to move forward with intention.
Introduce all three service categories with a short blurb and links to their detailed pages.
Whether you’re exploring what’s next, leading through change, or seeking guidance for your team — I’d love to hear from you.
Discover who you are — and where you want to go.

For young adults stepping into the world of work, career decisions can feel overwhelming. I help clients uncover their strengths, build confidence, and navigate the transition from uncertainty to action.
Whether you’re exploring career options, preparing for interviews, or rebuilding self-belief, our sessions focus on clarity, direction, and resilience.
Career planning and job search strategies
Empower your next chapter with confidence and self-awareness.
Interactive sessions for schools, organizations, and community programs focused on confidence-building, communication, and navigating career uncertainty in a changing world.

For experienced professionals, managers, and executives, growth often comes at the intersection of challenge and change. My coaching helps leaders deepen self-awareness, strengthen influence, and navigate complex environments with purpose and clarity.
organizational effectiveness, HR strategy, and leadership development
, I help clients translate insight into action and align who they are as leaders with the impact they want to make.
Transitioning into senior or expanded leadership roles

My executive coaching blends evidence-based coaching techniques with practical business insight. Each engagement is personalized, confidential, and outcome-oriented — balancing reflection with forward movement.
Empower yourself to lead with clarity, confidence, and compassion.
Change isn’t just an organizational event — it’s a deeply human experience. With over two decades of expertise in
change management, organizational effectiveness, and facilitation
, I coach individuals, leaders, and teams to move from resistance to readiness, and from uncertainty to engagement.
Change coaching creates space to understand reactions, build resilience, and align people around a shared purpose — turning disruption into opportunity.
Coaching through organizational transformation and restructuring
Helping leaders communicate and lead change effectively
Supporting teams to regain focus, trust, and cohesion
Building individual adaptability and resilience during uncertainty
Facilitating change readiness and alignment across functions
Whether you’re leading change or living through it, coaching can provide the reflection, tools, and confidence needed to move forward with purpose.
Change is inevitable — growth through it is intentional.
Organizational Effectiveness, HR and Change management Consulting:
Human Resources, Organizational Effectiveness, and Change Leadership
, I’ve witnessed how uncertainty can shape — and sometimes stall — growth.
move through those moments with confidence and purpose. As a
I combine deep corporate insight with an empathetic, human-centered approach.

I’ve worked across global and matrix organizations, guiding executives, teams, and emerging talent through transformation. My approach is rooted in curiosity, connection, and the belief that lasting change starts with self-awareness.
Culture as an enabler for growth

Whether you’re an emerging professional discovering your next step, an executive navigating transformation, or a leader guiding others through change — I help you find clarity, build confidence, and move forward with purpose.
Creating Space for Growth and Self-Discovery
Today’s world moves fast — expectations are high, opportunities are endless, and comparison is constant. Many young adults find themselves asking,
My coaching offers a space to pause, reflect, and rebuild confidence. Together, we uncover your strengths, explore what motivates you, and design a plan to move forward with intention and resilience.
I believe that purpose isn’t found overnight — it’s cultivated through curiosity, courage, and small, consistent steps toward what feels meaningful and true to you.
